name: 40kdc-pipeline
description: Data pipeline: converts the @alpaca-software/40kdc-data 11th-edition dataset into this game's data formats (army rosters, mission cards, stratagems/detachments/factions, leader pairings). Run `npm install` then `node extract.mjs` to refresh 40k/data/40kdc/, and the generate-*.mjs scripts to regenerate game data.
